creator: q@galgenberg.net
text:
this problem seems fixed, please close this PR

on 4.7-STABLE with USE_MOTIF in /etc/make.conf

/usr/ports/x11-toolkits/open-motif# make package-depends-list
"/usr/ports/x11-toolkits/open-motif/Makefile", line 34: You have
`USE_MOTIF' variable defined either in environment or in make(1) arguments.
Please undefine and try again.
Exit 1
